_meta.source: Hungarian market seeded estimates with EUR/HUF adjustment
_meta.methodology: Seeded estimates adjusted for EUR/HUF; scraper pipeline in progress, not yet contributing observations as of 2026-04-21. Every price block carries source="estimated". Placeholder models (_estimated=true) are stubs copied from the nearest same-brand donor (recorded in _donor_model) to unblock the frontend; they are NOT independent observations and must not be aggregated as such.
_meta.depreciation_model: Year 1: -22%, Year 2-3: -11%/yr, Year 4-6: -9%/yr, Year 7-10: -6%/yr, 10+: -4%/yr, floor: 6% of new price
_meta.years_included: Even years 2010-2024 (per-model cap where model is out of production)
_meta.price_range_note: min/max reflect condition and mileage variance (low-km excellent vs high-km fair)

last_adjustment.note: Adjustments are derived from EUR/HUF rate movement only; no live listings sampled yet.

_meta.warning: All prices are SEEDED ESTIMATES. Observation pipeline (aggregate-prices.py + scrapers) is not yet contributing. Placeholder models are donor copies and must not be treated as independent samples.
_meta.taxonomy_note: Brand keys canonicalized on 2026-04-21 to vehicle-data.js form: "VW" -> "Volkswagen", "Mercedes" -> "Mercedes-Benz". Model keys NOT renamed in this round — frontend must tolerate both Anglicized ("3-Series") and canonical ("3-as (E90/F30/G20)") variants, or a follow-up rename round is required.
